params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, CloseDate, Amount FROM Opportunity WHERE Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' AND StageName = 'Closed Won' AND CloseDate >= 2025-01-01 AND CloseDate <= 2026-03-31 ORDER BY CloseDate ASC LIMIT 2000
